name: Weobley Castle & Landimore
dog_lead_policy: On lead (sheep — famous Gower salt marsh lamb)
highlights: Clifftop castle ruin looking over vast saltmarsh.
points_of_interest: Weobley Castle (Cadw); wreck of the Paul at low tide
food_drink_nearby: Welcome to Town Llanrhidian; Greyhound Inn Oldwalls
hazards_notes: Saltmarsh unsafe to walk on — stay on path
